author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: 4 PTX GPU kernels (index_select_1d, scatter_add_1d, masked_fill, masked_zero) with full plumbing through GpuBackend trait → CudaBackendImpl → grad_fns/indexing.rs. All indexing ops now dispatch to GPU when input is_cuda(), keeping tensors on-device. scatter_add uses atom.global.add.f32 for safe concurrent accumulation with duplicate indices. MaskedFillBackward changed from Vec<usize> sparse indices to Vec<bool> full mask for GPU reconstruction. All 574 core tests pass.
